reviews.review_title: Decent but just a web app.
reviews.review_description: The app itself is okay. I have found almost no bugs so far except for one when I open the app and a channel plays but some of it is cut off and I have to scroll to the right to see it. The streaming quality is actually amazing but when installing I thought it would be a similar experience to what the pluto TV quest app offers with it's immersive environment but this app is just a web app meant for a keyboard and mouse. It's not even specialized for the quest it just opens up the website to directv. I could do that with the quest browser. I think they should add an immersive mode like what pluto TV has and the regular AR mode like it is currently but more optimized for the quest. I use the Quest 3S.

As a DirecTV customer I've been hoping for a Quest app.  Works well and does have the ability to toggle from a large,  movable AR screen to a much larger and simple immersive function.  No bugs and easy to use.
